        field_simp
        <;> ring
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : 2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x ≥ 0 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1), sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2), Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num), Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
      have h5 : (2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x) / (2 * x) ≥ 0 := by
        apply div_nonneg
        linarith
        linarith
      linarith
    linarith
  linarith [h1]

intro x hx
  have h1 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
    have h2 : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := by
      have h3 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ 0 := by
        have hx1 : x > 0 := hx
        have h4 : x + 1 / (2 * x) > 0 := by
          have h5 : x > 0 := hx1
          have h6 : 1 / (2 * x) > 0 := by
            apply div_pos
            norm_num
            linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      have h4 : (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 ≥ 2 := by
        have h5 : (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 - 2 ≥ 0 := by
          have h6 : (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 - 2 = (x - 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 := by
            field_simp
            ring
          rw [h6]
          have h7 : (x - 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by
            exact sq_nonneg (x - 1 / (2 * x))
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h5 : Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := Real.sqrt_nonneg 2
      have h8 : (Real.sqrt 2) ^ 2 = 2 := Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num)
      nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, h4, h8, h3]

intro x hx
  have h1 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
    have h2 : x > 0 := hx
    have h3 : (x + 1 / (2 * x)) / 2 ≥ Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) := by
      apply Real.geom_mean_le_arith_mean2
      all_goals
        positivity
    have h4 : x * (1 / (2 * x)) = 1 / 2 := by
      field_simp
      <;> nlinarith
    have h5 : Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) = Real.sqrt (1 / 2) := by
      rw [h4]
    have h6 : Real.sqrt (1 / 2) = Real.sqrt 2 / 2 := by
      rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq] <;> norm_num
      <;> ring_nf <;> norm_num
    have h7 : Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) = Real.sqrt 2 / 2 := by
      rw [h5, h6]
    rw [h7] at h3
    linarith
  have h2 : Real.sqrt 2 ≤ x + 1 / (2 * x) := by linarith [h1]
  linarith

intro x hx
  have h1 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by

            ring
          rw [h6]
          positivity
        linarith
      have h7 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ 0 := by
        have hx1 : x > 0 := hx
        have h8 : 1 / (2 * x) > 0 := by
          apply div_pos
          norm_num
          linarith
        positivity
      have h8 : Real.sqrt ((x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2) ≥ Real.sqrt (2 : ℝ) := Real.sqrt_le_sqrt (by linarith [h3])
      have h9 : Real.sqrt ((x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2) = x + 1 / (2 * x) := by
        rw [Real.sqrt_sq (show 0 ≤ x + 1 / (2 * x) by linarith [h7])]
      linarith [h9, h8]
    linarith
  linarith [h1]

      linarith
    linarith
  linarith [h1]

intro x hx
  have h1 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
    have h2 : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := by
      have h3 : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 = (2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - Real.sqrt 2 * (2 * x)) / (2 * x) := by
        field_simp
        <;> ring
      rw [h3]
      have h4 : 2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - Real.sqrt 2 * (2 * x) ≥ 0 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1), sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2), Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num), Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
      have h5 : (2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - Real.sqrt 2 * (2 * x)) / (2 * x) ≥ 0 := by
        apply div_nonneg
        linarith
        all_goals linarith
      linarith
    linarith
  linarith [h1]

intro x hx
  have h1 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
    have h2 : x > 0 := hx
    have h3 : 2 * x > 0 := by linarith
    have h4 : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := by
      have h5 : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 = (2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x) / (2 * x) := by
        field_simp
        <;> ring
      rw [h5]
      have h6 : 2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x ≥ 0 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2), Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (show (0 : ℝ) < (2 : ℝ) by norm_num), Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num), sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2), Real.sqrt_nonneg 2]
      apply div_nonneg
      linarith
      all_goals linarith
    linarith
  linarith [h1]

intro x hx
  have h1 : 0 < x := hx
  have h2 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
    have h3 : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := by
      have h4 : x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2 = (2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - 2 * x * Real.sqrt 2) / (2 * x) := by
        field_simp
        <;> ring_nf <;> field_simp
        <;> ring
      rw [h4]
      have h5 : 2 * x ^ 2 + 1 - 2 * x * Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := by
        nlinarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 by norm_num), sq_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1), sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2)]
      have h6 : (2 * x) > 0 := by
        nlinarith
      apply div_nonneg
      · linarith
      · nlinarith
    linarith
  have h3 : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    have h4 : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := h2
    linarith
  linarith
